problem_solved: Medicaid and dual-eligible populations face fragmented care with unmet social needs, leading to poor outcomes and high costs for health plans
solution_description: Value-based care provider specifically designed for Medicaid and dually-eligible populations. Combines primary care, mental health, and social care services through community health partners (CHPs). In-person and virtual care model with 24/7 access and care coordination
traction_signals: Multiple clinic locations in underserved communities
Community Health Partner model for SDOH support
Co-founded by former Commonwealth Care Alliance leaders
notes: Leading value-based care provider for Medicaid. Strong SDOH integration through CHP model. Focus on relationship-based care. Addresses housing, food, childcare, and social needs alongside medical care. High Varden fit - serves complex populations with integrated social/medical care
